text:
Created attachment 157039
rubygem-html2haml.diff

Depends on Bug 200386:
  https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=200386

- Version update from 1.0.1 to 2.0.0
- Remove www/rubygem-hpricot from RUN_DEPENDS
- Add textproc/rubygem-nokogiri to RUN_DEPENDS
- Remove USE_RAKE=yes
- Add NO_ARCH=yes

# portlint -AC
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
0 fatal errors and 1 warning found.
